0001001111101101 0100100100111111 1 -> sum: 0101110100101101, cout: 0
1110000011100011 0110001111111110 1 -> sum: 0100010011100010, cout: 1
0011000100100101 0010101111100010 0 -> sum: 0101110100000111, cout: 0
0110011010011001 0111011101011010 1 -> sum: 1101110111110100, cout: 0
1011100001011100 1000011110101101 0 -> sum: 0100000000001001, cout: 1
1010110101011001 1010001101001010 1 -> sum: 0101000010100100, cout: 1
0000000000000000 0000000000000000 0 -> sum: 0000000000000000, cout: 0
1111111111111111 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 1
0000000000000000 1111111111111111 0 -> sum: 1111111111111111, cout: 0
1111111111111110 1111111111111111 1 -> sum: 1111111111111110, cout: 1
